scripts.dev: npm run build -w @splash/shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @splash/server" "npm run dev -w @splash/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @splash/shared && npm run build -w @splash/server && npm run build -w @splash/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @splash/shared && npm run typecheck -w @splash/server && npm run typecheck -w @splash/client
